title: /receive warning 'Use /pay for fresh subaddresses' is wrong
description: /pay initiates a payment FROM the user TO someone else — it does not generate a fresh receive address for the user. The warning 'Use /pay for fresh subaddresses' is factually incorrect and will confuse users. A user who wants to receive ZEC with a fresh address cannot do that by typing /pay. The correct statement: 'For unlinkable receipts, use the payment protocol — ask the payer to type /pay <your-handle> <amount> in chat. That generates a fresh address per session.' Fix: rewrite the /receive warning.
